title: stelis brevis
intro: Stelis brevis, also known as the short stelis, is a species of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis brevis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Stelis brevis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
